name: Jackpot 7
name_jp: ジャックポット<ruby lang="jp"><rb>７</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>セブン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: Shuffle this card from the field into the Deck. When this card in your possession is sent to your Graveyard by an opponent's card effect: Banish this card. If 3 of your "Jackpot 7" are currently banished, and were all banished by this effect, you win the Duel.
eff: When this card is activated: Shuffle this card from the field into the Deck. When this card in your possession is sent to your Graveyard by an opponent's card effect: Banish this card. If 3 of your "Jackpot 7" are currently banished, and were all banished by this effect, you win the Duel.

action: Returns itself from field to Deck
